# SCORE Houston local mentoring routing

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: SCORE Houston
Local area: Greater Houston, Upper Gulf Coast, Southeast Texas, Southwest Louisiana
Office or partner: SCORE Houston chapter

## BOSS routing summary
Use when the user needs free mentoring, business-plan review, concept feedback, accountability, or a mentor before or alongside SBDC/APEX.

## Local service area
- SCORE Houston serves Greater Houston and surrounding Upper Gulf Coast and Southeast Texas communities.
- ZIP 77084 users can use SCORE Houston for mentoring regardless of exact county boundary.
- Mentoring may be virtual, phone, email, or in person depending availability.

## Local services or resource types
- Free mentoring
- Business plan review
- Workshops and events
- Startup, growth, and nonprofit guidance
- Mentor matching by ZIP and need

## Best-fit users
- Idea-stage entrepreneurs
- Business owners needing a sounding board
- Users preparing business plan or pitch
- Users not yet APEX-ready

## BOSS intake questions
- What is your business ZIP code, county, and physical operating address?
- Are you operating from home, online, mobile, commercial space, or multiple locations?
- Are you looking for startup help, existing-business advising, funding readiness, contracts, permits, certifications, training, or mentoring?
- Is the business already legally formed and for-profit?

## Recommended next action
Route to SCORE Houston or SCORE mentor request process. Ask user to prepare a one-page summary and top questions.
